sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16710" key="a)stupole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστυ-πολέω</orth>, <sense id="n16710.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go up and down in a city, live in it, frequent the streets,</tr_> Theopomp. Hist.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4024.tlg001:114a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">114a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:8:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope> </bibl> and <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
